hooks.prompt: Silently check if .workflows/current-state.md exists. If yes, read it and tell the user in ONE line: 'Active workflow: <workflow> — <feature> (phase: <phase>). Use /claude-workflows:resume to continue.' Also check for .workflows/paused-*.md files for paused workflows. If nothing found, say nothing at all.

Check if .workflows/current-state.md has an active workflow. If so, verify the quality gate was run (look for quality gate output in the workflow's output directory). If NOT run, BLOCK with: 'Run the pre-PR quality gate first — load review checklists and self-check all High/Critical items against the diff.' Otherwise allow.
